zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN於1231年出生在法國時，她的父親Jean I D'Ollehain23歲，母親Ade De Rollancourt19歲。她於1247年12月8日與Hellin de WAVRIN結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN was born in 1231, in France, her father, Jean I D'Ollehain, was 23 and her mother, Ade De Rollancourt, was 19. She married Hellin de WAVRIN on 8 December 1247. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1286, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN est née en 1231, à France, son père, Jean I D'Ollehain, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ade De Rollancourt, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Hellin de WAVRIN le 8 décembre 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1286, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN 1231 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean I D'Ollehain 23 und ihre Mutter Ade De Rollancourt 19. Sie hat am 8. Dezember 1247 Hellin de WAVRIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN è nata il nel 1231 nel Francia, sua padre, Jean I D'Ollehain, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Ade De Rollancourt, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Hellin de WAVRIN il 8 dicembre 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1286, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Maria D'OLHAINが1231年にフランスで生まれた時，父Jean I D'Ollehainは23歳，母Ade De Rollancourtは19歳であった。1247年12月8日にHellin de WAVRINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN(이)가 1231년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean I D'Ollehain(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ade De Rollancourt(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1247년 12월 8일 Hellin de WAVRIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN nasceu em 1231, em França, seu pai, Jean I D'Ollehain, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ade De Rollancourt, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Hellin de WAVRIN em 8 de dezembro de 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1286, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN родилась в 1231 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Jean I D'Ollehain было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ade De Rollancourt, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hellin de WAVRIN 8 декабря 1247 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1286 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN nació en 1231, en Francia, su papá, Jean I D'Ollehain, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ade De Rollancourt, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hellin de WAVRIN el 8 de diciembre de 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1286, a la edad de 55 años.
